# Matzah Caterers
> Premium Event Catering & Authentic Kerala Cuisine in Kochi.

## Main sections
- [Homepage](https://www.matzahcaterers.in/): Core catering services for wedding receptions, corporate events, and grand celebrations in Kochi.
- [Menu Overview](https://www.matzahcaterers.in/menu): Details on Welcoming Appetizers, Curated Feast Displays, Grand Buffets, Traditional Sadhyas, and Plated Elegance.

## Key facts
- Matzah Caterers is based in Kochi, Kerala, India.
- Services specialize in Authentic Kerala Cuisine and Composed Hospitality.
- Offerings range from traditional family-style Sadhyas to formal Plated Elegance.
- Contact for general inquiries at info@matzahcaterers.com.
- Phone and WhatsApp contact: +91 8921038043.
